shots.title: Character A Lock — Curious Mom
shots.note: Use this exact brunette character identity across every Character A shot: same face, brunette ponytail, same body type, same age range, same upscale activewear direction, no sunglasses, no eyewear, no wardrobe changes.

shots.title: Character B Lock — Meal Prep Revolution Mom
shots.note: Use this exact blonde character identity across every Character B shot: same face, blonde beach-wave hair, same body type, same age range, same upscale activewear direction, no sunglasses, no eyewear, no wardrobe changes.

shots.title: Camera A Lock — Repeat For Every Character A Line
shots.note: One repeatable angle only. Character A is sharp and speaking, framed on the right side of the vertical frame. Character B's blonde shoulder/hair is softly blurred in the bottom-left foreground. Both recumbent bikes are side-by-side, parallel, and facing the same direction. Character A turns her head toward Character B, not toward the camera. Use only tiny crop adjustments if needed; do not redesign the shot.

shots.title: Camera B Lock — Repeat For Every Character B Line
shots.note: One repeatable angle only. Character B is sharp and speaking, framed slightly left of center. Character A's brunette shoulder/pony tail is softly blurred on the right edge or lower-right foreground. Both recumbent bikes are side-by-side, parallel, and facing the same direction. Character B turns her head toward Character A, not toward the camera. Use only tiny crop adjustments if needed; do not redesign the shot.

shots.title: CTA Lock — Website Screenshot With Voiceover
shots.note: Do not show Character B performing the CTA on the bike. Put the CTA audio over this actual website screenshot. Preserve the screenshot graphics exactly.
